response.original_title: Sinposis Filem Tiga Janda Melawan Dunia
response.overview: The story follows Midah, Rohayu and Ani, 3 widows from a remote village, who are devoted fans of singer Aiman Zalini. When the singer's final concert is announced, the three women try and do everything they can to raise money. But they fail. Without losing hope, they attempt to do the most extraordinary thing, possibly inspired by the immediate success of a local loafer who creates an additive-free vape juice business, all natural, non-tobacco! Their vape formula created with the help of a humble lab assistant becomes an unexpected success and they have enough money to buy concert tickets! However, unknowingly, the viral and natural vape juice has caused many drug addicts to recover and this creates a demand issue for the drug cartel leader. What follows is a series of funny and heartwarming events that will change their lives forever.
response.title: Sinposis Filem Tiga Janda Melawan Dunia
